revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|</includeonly>{{Mbox
| style = border:2px var(--border-color-error, #f54739) solid;
| type = delete
| image = [[File:Stop hand.svg|45px]]
| text = {{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat template]] should only be used to categorize redirects that are {{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|outside|outside|in}} the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{nbsp}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|and|or}} the ''{{{2}}}'' namespace.|.}}}}
}}<includeonly>[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}}|Category|{{Mbox
| style = border:2px var(--border-color-error, #f54739) solid;
| type = delete
| image = [[File:Stop hand.svg|45px]]
| text = {{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat template]] should only be used to categorize redirects that are {{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|outside|outside|in}} the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{nbsp}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|and|or}} the ''{{{2}}}'' namespace.|.}}}}
}}[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}}|User|{{Mbox
| style = border:2px var(--border-color-error, #f54739) solid;
| type = delete
| image = [[File:Stop hand.svg|45px]]
| text = {{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat template]] should only be used to categorize redirects that are {{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|outside|outside|in}} the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{nbsp}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|and|or}} the ''{{{2}}}'' namespace.|.}}}}
}}[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}}|Wikipedia|{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:WikiProject Scouting/Templates||{{Mbox
| style = border:2px var(--border-color-error, #f54739) solid;
| type = delete
| image = [[File:Stop hand.svg|45px]]
| text = {{Error|The above [[WP:RCAT|rcat template]] should only be used to categorize redirects that are {{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|outside|outside|in}} the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{nbsp}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|and|or}} the ''{{{2}}}'' namespace.|.}}}}
}}[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]}}}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|yes|</includeonly>{{Mbox

</noinclude>
